allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Write-Output 'Fetching site structure'; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://www.nolanomura.com/' -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | Select-String -Pattern '\(color|background|font|animation|transition|rgba|hex|#[0-9a-f]{3,6}\)' -AllMatches | Select-Object -First 50")
